tagline: More jobs. More reviews. Less chasing.
one_liner: I help cleaning company owners get more jobs by making sure they show up on Google, respond to leads instantly, and stack 5-star reviews on autopilot.
problem_statement: You're good at what you do. Your clients love you. But your phone isn't ringing enough — and when it does, you're too busy on a job to answer fast enough. Meanwhile, the company down the road with worse service is ranking above you on Google because they have 200 reviews and you have 30. Your growth is stuck on referrals and hope.
solution_statement: I set up a system that gets you found, gets you leads, and makes sure no lead slips through the cracks. Your Google profile works harder. Your reviews grow every week. And every lead gets a response in under 2 minutes — even when you're on a job site.

how_it_works.title: Audit & Setup
how_it_works.description: I audit your Google presence, website, and how you currently handle leads. Then I fix what's broken — your Google Business Profile, your landing pages, and your response system.

how_it_works.title: Turn On the Engine
how_it_works.description: I launch your review generation system, build local landing pages targeting your service areas, and set up instant lead response so you never lose a job to a slow reply again.

how_it_works.title: Monthly Optimization
how_it_works.description: Every month I send you a report: how many leads came in, how many converted, and how much revenue that represents. I adjust the system to keep improving.

setup.name: Setup
includes: Review generation system (automated post-job review requests)
5-10 local SEO landing pages (service + city combos)
Lead capture form with instant auto-response
Tracking setup so every lead is attributed

monthly.name: Monthly Retainer
includes: New landing pages for expanded service areas

performance_bonus.description: Optional: 5-10% of revenue from new commercial contracts sourced through the system
performance_bonus.note: Only propose this once trust is established and tracking is solid

guarantee: If the system doesn't generate at least 10 qualified leads in the first 60 days, I'll work for free until it does.

roi_math.example: Average commercial cleaning contract = $2,500/month. If I help you land just 2 new contracts, that's $60K/year in new revenue. Your investment: ~$20K/year. That's a 3x return.
roi_math.conservative: Even 1 new recurring commercial contract covers the entire year of service.

social_proof_plan: SanityFree as founding case study — free 30-day pilot in exchange for testimonial and full metrics access
Document: Google ranking before/after, review count growth, leads generated, jobs booked
Screenshot real results: lead notifications, review increases, revenue dashboards
Build a simple before/after one-pager for each client
cta: I'll audit your Google presence for free and show you exactly where you're losing leads. Takes 15 minutes.
